#FOBIJE

Ide priДҚa da u oku mom Д‘avo stanuje
NoДҮ je gore
Jutra hladna kвҖҷo led

Da se svima
Pakao samo raduje
Jer tu ljubav ne stiЕҫe na red

A ti znaЕЎ, zar ne?!
Nisam kriva ja
Posle tebe bol me je
LoЕЎe skrojila

Nema sad ЕЎanse da opet volim
Pancir sa ovog srca da sklonim
Jer joЕЎ uvek me
Lome fobije
Da me isti kalibar ne ubije
Jer joЕЎ uvek me
Lome fobije
Da me isti kalibar ne ubije

Pored mene
Samo ranjene duЕЎe padaju
KвҖҷo da sada
Samo radim na zlo
BaЕЎ od one,
One ЕЎto za ljubav bi dala sve

Nije ostalo

Vidim sve, ДҚujem sve, sve predoseДҮam,

Ja u tebi sve sam naЕЎla.

Moj si, moj savrЕЎen greh, neДҮu, ne Еҫelim da stanem,
Ja bih da zagrlim te, a ti bi da odeЕЎ odavde.

U oДҚi dok gledam te sad, kвҖҷo dete u poruЕЎen grad...

snippet.title: Bosanac kupio pravi vlak u voznom stanju
snippet.description:
Mladen CvitanoviДҮ iz Golubinja kod ЕҪepДҚa svjetski je putnik. Bio je najmlaД‘i vojnik Vijetnamskog rata, radio na naftnim platformama, boksao u NorveЕЎkoj i pobijedio 94 puta. DoЕҫivio je desetak poraza. Njegov djed je bio ЕҫeljezniДҚar i u spomen na njega kupio je prvo parnu lokomotivu iz ЕҪeljezare Zenica u ispravnom stanju a onda i dva vagona od hrvatskih Еҫeljeznica. Mladen svako jutro trДҚi osam kilometara. Ima svoju teretanu gdje vjeЕҫba a proizvodi i domaДҮa jaja koja prodaje trgovinama i seljacima koji ne Еҫele uzgajati koke. Mladenova namjera je obnoviti Titov plavi voz koji ДҮe biti turistiДҚka atrakcija u Centralnoj Bosni, odnosno BiH. ZavrЕЎio je i projekt ЕҫeljezniДҚke stanice a od jeseni za turiste ДҮe biti na raspolaganju i jedan helikopter za obilazak poznatih turistiДҚkih destinacija. Mladen je u vojsci vozio ne samo helikoptere nego i avione. Svjetski putnik iz ЕҪepДҚa ima oko 65 godina ali i toliko ideja kao da mu je 35 godina. Pogledajte ovu neobiДҚnu priДҚu iz Golubinje kod ЕҪepДҚa.
PridruЕҫite se tom kanalu da biste dobili pristup pogodnostima:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCIu6gtFVDK1u93irvvVrD2A/join

en.title: Bosnian man bought a real train
en.description: Mladen CvitanoviДҮ from Golubinje, near ЕҪepДҚe, is a world traveler. He was the youngest Vietnam War soldier, worked on oil rigs, boxed in Norway, and won 94 times. He suffered a dozen defeats. His grandfather was a railway worker and in his memory he first bought a steam locomotive from the Zenica Ironworks in good condition, and then two wagons from the Croatian Railways. Mladen runs eight kilometres every morning. It has its own gym where it exercises and also produces homemade eggs which it sells to shops and farmers who do not want to grow chickens. Mladen's intention is to restore Tito's blue train, which will be a tourist attraction in Central Bosnia, ie BiH. The project of the railway station has also been completed, and from the autumn, a helicopter will be available for tourists to tour well-known tourist destinations. Mladen drove, not only helicopters, but also planes in the army. The world traveler from ЕҪepДҚe is about 65 years old, but he has as many ideas as if he were 35 years old. Take a look at this unusual story from Golubinja near ЕҪepДҚe.

snippet.title: VELIKA ILUZIJA 5S 147 EM // Specijal: Dara iz Jasenovca
snippet.description:
U specijalu posveДҮenom filmu "Dara iz Jasenovca", ДҚija je ekskluzivna svetska televizijska premijera na RTS-u, u "Krupnom planu" je reditelj Predrag Gaga AntonijeviДҮ.

Zbog ДҚega se film pre zvaniДҚne bioskopske premijere u Srbiji zakazane za 22. april kada se obeleЕҫava 76 godina od proboja poslednjih zarobljenika iz logora Jasenovac, prikazuje na televiziji? U kojoj meri su negativni prikazi bili opreteДҮenje za film u kontekstu trke za oskarovsku nominaciju? Zbog ДҚega "Dara iz Jasenovca" izaziva reakcije i napade onih koji relativizuju zloДҚine? Pored reditelja, u specijalu govore scenaristkinja NataЕЎa DrakuliДҮ, glumci Biljana ДҢekiДҮ, Marko JanketiДҮ, Igor ДҗorД‘eviДҮ, Nikolina FreganoviДҮ, Anja StaniДҮ IliДҮ, scenograf Goran JoksimoviДҮ, kompozitori Aleksandra KovaДҚ i Roman GorЕЎek.

Autor emisije: Sandra PeroviДҮ
Realizacija: Marija AranД‘eloviДҮ, Svetlana PeroviДҮ, Marko JeftiДҮ.

Label and copyright: Radio-televizija Srbije

snippet.title: Watch NASAвҖҷs Perseverance Rover Land on Mars!
snippet.description:
Watch an epic journey unfold on Thursday, Feb. 18 as our Perseverance rover lands on Mars. To reach the surface of the Red Planet, the rover has to survive the harrowing final phase known as Entry, Descent, and Landing.
 
Only then can the rover вҖ“ the biggest, heaviest, cleanest, and most sophisticated six-wheeled robot ever launched into space вҖ“ search Jezero Crater for signs of ancient life and collect samples that will eventually be returned to Earth.
 
Tune in to a live video feed of key landing activities and commentary from Mission Control at NASAвҖҷs Jet Propulsion Laboratory.

localized.title: Watch NASAвҖҷs Perseverance Rover Land on Mars!
localized.description:
Watch an epic journey unfold on Thursday, Feb. 18 as our Perseverance rover lands on Mars. To reach the surface of the Red Planet, the rover has to survive the harrowing final phase known as Entry, Descent, and Landing.
 
Only then can the rover вҖ“ the biggest, heaviest, cleanest, and most sophisticated six-wheeled robot ever launched into space вҖ“ search Jezero Crater for signs of ancient life and collect samples that will eventually be returned to Earth.
 
Tune in to a live video feed of key landing activities and commentary from Mission Control at NASAвҖҷs Jet Propulsion Laboratory.

snippet.title: Vladika Porfirije pjeva ДҚetniДҚke pjesme
snippet.description:
Novi patrijarh SPC-a Porfirije, do danas mitropolit zagrebaДҚko-ljubljanski osvanuo je prije pet godina na video snimku, kako u zanimljivom druЕЎtvu pjeva ДҚetniДҚku pjesmu posveДҮenu ДҚetniДҚkom vojvodi MomДҚilu ДҗujiДҮu, ratnom zloДҚincu iz Drugog svjetskog rata.

Snimak je navodno nastao prije pet godina u Chicagu.

- Nakon liturgije bio je ruДҚak i zabava, rekao sam Voji Bilbiji da otpjeva "naЕЎu pjesmu", misleДҮi na "Tamo daleko". On je poДҚeo pjevati pjesmu koju i ne znam i nekako sam pjevuЕЎio za njima, malo iznenaД‘en ЕЎto nije zapjevao onu koju sam mislio, pa sam u jednom trenutku i zaЕЎutio - pravdao se Porfirije u hrvatskim medijima rekavЕЎi da je zaЕЎutio kada se pjevalo o "kokardi vojvode ДҗujiДҮa".

Iz snimke se jasno vidi da je PeriДҮ velik dio pjesme zaista opjevao, a veДҮ od poДҚetka same pjesme jasno je da se radi o pjesmi ratne tematike s obzirom da se spominju "mitraljesci" i "granate".

- Е ta se ono na Dinari sjaji, ДҗujiДҮeva kokarda na glavi - kaЕҫe sporni stih, a teЕЎko je procijeniti je li Porfirije zaista, kako tvrdi, prestao pjevati.

Pop MomДҚilo ДҗujiДҮ ДҚetniДҚki je vojvoda i ratni zloДҚinac odgovoran za neke od najgnusnijih zloДҚina na ovim podruДҚjima u Drugom svjetskom ratu. ДҗujiДҮevi ДҚetnici jedan od najveДҮih pokolja napravili su u selu Gata u zaleД‘u OmiЕЎa kada su 1.oktobra 1942. godine zvjerski poklali 95 civila.

snippet.title: Perseverance RoverвҖҷs Descent and Touchdown on Mars (Official NASA Video)
snippet.description:
NASA's Mars 2020 Perseverance mission captured thrilling footage of its rover landing in Mars' Jezero Crater on Feb. 18, 2021.  The real footage in this video was captured by several cameras that are part of the rover's entry, descent, and landing suite. The views include a camera looking down from the spacecraft's descent stage (a kind of rocket-powered jet pack that helps fly the rover to its landing site), a camera on the rover looking up at the descent stage, a camera on the top of the aeroshell (a capsule protecting the rover) looking up at that parachute, and a camera on the bottom of the rover looking down at the Martian surface.
 
The audio embedded in the video comes from the mission control call-outs during entry, descent, and landing. 
 
For more information about Perseverance, visit https://mars.nasa.gov/perseverance
 
Credit: NASA/JPL-Caltech

Text:

Ref:
Ja sam hazla 

Cunami PBR THC geng vrti Sarajevo ooo 
Flo gros patroliram ЕЎeherom
Adrese stiЕҫem ko amazon 
Na licu osmijeh in da biznis zone
Na cosku s gengom iznad zuji dron
Lobe brado baro gori marlboro

Samo sport ooo ovo moj je sport uouuo 
Siempre pronto siempre pronto
Textil OG kush ganjamo plus
Zakucava kazaljka radijus
Ne mogu niЕЎta pa kazne nam piЕЎu
Evo na kafu pa odjebi U
(Hazla)

Ref:
Ja sam hazla

Od para suhe ruke tvrde od vratila
Ambicije biznisi price u kvadratima
Nista telefoni samo turska kupatila
Mala nam evropa jasemo ko Atila

Jangeri u spremi niko ne da na svoj blok
Cjevanicama punim hladno udara se ЕЎtok
Za desetoro brace mati sprema wok 
Nagazili ЕЎmekera podrum soba shock

Ljubav u mahali drama scenario
Rumeni obrazi al nije kardio

Sudbina takva keЕЎ ДҮemo duplat
Kurve se Еҫale da neДҮe se udat
Dobrom se robom ko sefte lupat
Oprat keЕЎovinu korov poДҚupat

Ref:
Ja sam hazla


в„— Cunami Flo

snippet.title: Emanet 120. BГ¶lГјm FragmanДұ | Legacy Episode 120 Promo (English & Spanish subs)
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman KДұrДұmlДұ is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his fatherвҖҷs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephewвҖҰ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncleвҖҷs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the KДұrДұmlДұ family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the KДұrДұmlДұ mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts. 

#Legacy
#Emanet
#SehYam

snippet.title: IZAЕ AO JE IZ PODZEMLJA SA PRIДҢAMA OD KOJIH STAJE DAH NebojЕЎa TubiДҮ ЕҪabac u Sceniranju 07.02.2021.
snippet.description:
Kontroverzni biznismen NebojЕЎa TubiДҮ ЕҪabac ovonedeljni je gost emisiji "Sceniranje" na Kurir televiziji. 
ЕҪabac je poznat kao ДҚovek sa beogradskog asfalta, jedan je od poslednjih preЕҫivelih aktera mraДҚnih devedesetih godina. On je poznavao gotovo sve ljude ДҚija su se imena u to vreme povezivala sa podzemljem.
Pre devet godina greЕЎkom je upucan u jednom lokalu u Novom Sadu, ali je preЕҫiveo i kao takav uЕЎao u Ginisovu knjigu rekorda.

snippet.title: Barcelona vs. Paris Saint-Germain: Extended Highlights | UCL on CBS Sports
snippet.description:
Extended Highlights presented by Heineken 

Mbappe and PSG power past Messi and Barcelona 4-1 in the first leg of the UEFA Champions League Round of 16. Mbappe had one of his best performances of his career notching a hat trick. He opened his day with a goal in the 32вҖҷ to tie at one and added two more in the 65вҖҷ and 85вҖҷ. Moise Kean found the back of the net in the 70вҖҷ to help solidify the win.  Messi opened the scoring in the 27вҖҷ by way of the penalty spot but that would be all the Spanish side could muster. 

Next up will be the second leg back in Paris, France and Barcelona has an uphill battle in front of them. 

Stream every UEFA Champions League match live on CBS All Access:
http://bit.ly/ucloncbssports

snippet.title: Emanet 121. BГ¶lГјm FragmanДұ | Legacy Episode 121 Promo (English & Spanish subs)
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman KДұrДұmlДұ is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his fatherвҖҷs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephewвҖҰ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncleвҖҷs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the KДұrДұmlДұ family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the KДұrДұmlДұ mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts. 

#Legacy
#Emanet
#SehYam

snippet.title: Emanet 124. BГ¶lГјm FragmanДұ | Legacy Episode 124 Promo
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman KДұrДұmlДұ is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his fatherвҖҷs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephewвҖҰ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncleвҖҷs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the KДұrДұmlДұ family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the KДұrДұmlДұ mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts. 

#Legacy
#Emanet
#SehYam

snippet.title: Dirljiv oproЕЎtaj od BalaЕЎeviДҮa i na splitskom Peristilu
snippet.description:
#Peristil #Split #Balasevic
Brojni oboЕҫavatelji s tugom se opraЕЎtaju od legendarnog kantautora ДҗorД‘a BalaЕЎeviДҮa. Najemotivnije je u njegovu Novom Sadu gdje su mu, pjevajuДҮi njegove pjesme, poДҚast odale stotine ljudi. Zastave su ondje spuЕЎtene na pola koplja.

Paljenjem svijeДҮa i pjevanjem njegovih pjesama, od Дҗoleta, kako ga od milja zovu, opraЕЎtaju se i oboЕҫavatelji diljem Hrvatske. Od legendardnog glazbenika oprostili su se brojni graД‘ani i na splitskom Peristilu.

snippet.title: 28 PARENTING HACKS From Crafty Moms And Dads || Tips for Being Friends with Your Child
snippet.description:
Tips and tricks every parent will be thankful for. 

Being a parent isnвҖҷt an easy task, and most of the time, parents come across more problems than they can solve. Well, to help you out, I wanted to share with you some amazing hacks that will save you time and the hassle that comes with taking care of a little one. Painting is everyoneвҖҷs favorite activity, but it can be very messy вҖ” and clothes get destroyed. So, to keep your little oneвҖҷs outfit nice and clean, use a plastic bag as an apron for them. Toddlers tend to drop their pacifiers all the time, and once the pacifier is down, it needs to be cleaned. To prevent that from happening, tie the pacifier on a balloon. You can use a closet organizer and label it for each day of the week to make sure that picking outfits for the day wonвҖҷt take hours. Watch until the end to discover all the genius parenting hacks you need to know. 

Timestamps: 

0:31 вҖ” The pacifier hack 

2:42 вҖ” A little water, pepper, and soap experiment 

5:32 вҖ” The getting along/best friendsвҖҷ shirt 

7:20 вҖ” Face mask too big? Try this hack 

8:58 вҖ” Tasty gummy bear lollies

snippet.title: Sen ГҮal KapДұmДұ 33. BГ¶lГјm 1. FragmanДұ
snippet.description:
Sen ГҮal KapДұmДұ 33. BГ¶lГјm 1. FragmanДұ

Hayatta bГјtГјn umutlarДұnДұ eДҹitimine baДҹlayan Eda, yurtdДұЕҹДұ eДҹitim bursunu keserek lise mezunu kalmasДұna neden olan Serkan BolatвҖҷla karЕҹДұ karЕҹДұya gelir. Serkan Bolat, kendisiyle iki ay niЕҹanlДұ taklidi yaparsa EdaвҖҷya bursunu geri vermeyi teklif eder. Eda nefret ettiДҹi bu adamДұn teklifini Г¶nce reddetse de koЕҹullar deДҹiЕҹince kabul etmek zorunda kalДұr. NiЕҹanlДұ taklidi yaparken, Serkan ve Eda , bГјtГјn doДҹru bildiklerini unutturacak, tutkulu, zorlu bir iliЕҹki yaЕҹamaya baЕҹlarlar. ГҮГјnkГј aЕҹk zordur. Ve bu yГјzden muhteЕҹemdir.

snippet.title: Zack Snyder's Justice League | Official Trailer | HBO Max
snippet.description:
In Zack Snyder's Justice League, determined to ensure SupermanвҖҷs (Henry Cavill) ultimate sacrifice was not in vain, Bruce Wayne (Ben Affleck) aligns forces with Diana Prince (Gal Gadot) with plans to recruit a team of metahumans to protect the world from an approaching threat of catastrophic proportions. The task proves more difficult than Bruce imagined, as each of the recruits must face the demons of their own pasts to transcend that which has held them back, allowing them to come together, finally forming an unprecedented league of heroes. Now united, Batman (Affleck), Wonder Woman (Gadot), Aquaman (Jason Momoa), Cyborg (Ray Fisher), and The Flash (Ezra Miller) may be too late to save the planet from Steppenwolf, DeSaad, and Darkseid and their dreadful intentions.

snippet.title: Zajedno imaju 130 godina
snippet.description:
Radoslav ДҗekiДҮ iz Bugojna i njegova Zastava 1500 zajedno imaju 130 godina. Radoslav ima 88 a njegov automobil 42 godine. Kupio ga je davne 1979. godine u Zenici. Rade kaЕҫe da je u to vrijeme Zastavu vozio samo predsjednik opДҮine Bugojno i rijetki pojedinci. Zastava je u odliДҚnom stanju. Njegov oldtimer nikada nije imao veДҮi kvar da nije mogao voziti a za 42 godine preЕЎao je 110000 kilometara. Danas ga rade provoza do svoga placa a prije nekoliko godina vozio se svojim ljubimcem i u Banjaluku. Iako ima dobrih ponuda da ga proda Radoslav joЕЎ uvijek nije odluku o prodaji. Misli da ДҮe to biti u ovoj godini. Mnogi mu kaЕҫu: "Vidi dobrog dede a joЕЎ boljeg auta", ЕЎali se Rade. Pogledajte neobiДҚan video iz Bugojna.
PridruЕҫite se tom kanalu da biste dobili pristup pogodnostima:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCIu6gtFVDK1u93irvvVrD2A/join

snippet.title: Mars Rover Landing Overview- NOW SAFE ON MARS!!!
snippet.description:
This will be cooler than the Super Bowl. Thanks to Bill and Melinda Gates for partnering with me on this video. Read the 2021 Annual Letter, here: http://gatesnot.es/3cfnMF6

Watch the live stream- https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gm0b_ijaYMQ&ab_channel=NASA
Main rover landing page- https://mars.nasa.gov/mars2020/
Cool rover interactive animation of the 7 mins of terror- https://eyes.nasa.gov/apps/mars2020/#/home?id=surface_operations&time=2021-02-18T12:44:05.006-08:00&rate=0
Spin the rover around in 3D- https://mars.nasa.gov/mars2020/spacecraft/rover/

Here is the video about why we should explore space even with problems here on Earth- https://youtu.be/lARpY0nIQx0

Music for the montage-

Explosions in the Sky
(Post-rock, four-member band from Texas.)

First Breath After Coma
https://youtu.be/w0o8JCxjjpM

Your Hand In Mine
https://youtu.be/cdiY6kijYHE

Song at 11:21- Bottles by A Shell in the Pit- https://open.spotify.com/track/0m6GMysIDx3gcQc6TF6HEX?si=FhjTlbBbQKayFrYtrw0dlg

snippet.title: Harmonika - lepeza pita. VruДҮa, lisnata omiljena za pola sata gotova! Malo je eksplodirala.
snippet.description:
Malo drugaДҚiji naДҚin slaganja pite. Ovako pravim godinama. U fil se moЕҫe dodati rendani krompir, mladi luk ili praziluk, spanaДҮ, blitva..
#pita #recept #harmonikapita
PISANI RECEPT NA  BLOGU:
http://www.serpica.net/2021/02/harmonika-lepeza-pita.html

Sastojci i priprema:

- 3 jajeta

- 1 kaЕЎiДҚica soli (ako je sir jako slan stavite manje soli)

- 6 kaЕЎika kisele pavlake

- 300 gr. sitnog sira

- 500 ml. mleka

- 100 ml. ulja

- 500 gr. kora za pitu



Umutite jaja, dodajte sve ostale sastojke i izmeЕЎajte.

Tepsiju podmaЕҫite uljem i na dno raЕЎirite jednu koru. Ostale listove kora savijte kao kada pravite lepezu i slazite jednu uz drugu dok ne popunite tepsiju. Tepsija je manja, otprilike kao polovina tepsije od rerne.

Preko sloЕҫenih kora sipajte fil, sipajte izmeД‘u kora. Ostavite da upije i odstoji jedno 15 minuta pa stavite u zagrejanu rernu na 200 stepeni.

PeДҚe se oko 35 minuta.


RAZNI RECEPTI - BIRAJTE

localized.title: Harmonika - lepeza pita. VruДҮa, lisnata omiljena za pola sata gotova! Malo je eksplodirala.
localized.description:
Malo drugaДҚiji naДҚin slaganja pite. Ovako pravim godinama. U fil se moЕҫe dodati rendani krompir, mladi luk ili praziluk, spanaДҮ, blitva..
#pita #recept #harmonikapita
PISANI RECEPT NA  BLOGU:
http://www.serpica.net/2021/02/harmonika-lepeza-pita.html

Sastojci i priprema:

- 3 jajeta

- 1 kaЕЎiДҚica soli (ako je sir jako slan stavite manje soli)

- 6 kaЕЎika kisele pavlake

- 300 gr. sitnog sira

- 500 ml. mleka

- 100 ml. ulja

- 500 gr. kora za pitu



Umutite jaja, dodajte sve ostale sastojke i izmeЕЎajte.

Tepsiju podmaЕҫite uljem i na dno raЕЎirite jednu koru. Ostale listove kora savijte kao kada pravite lepezu i slazite jednu uz drugu dok ne popunite tepsiju. Tepsija je manja, otprilike kao polovina tepsije od rerne.

Preko sloЕҫenih kora sipajte fil, sipajte izmeД‘u kora. Ostavite da upije i odstoji jedno 15 minuta pa stavite u zagrejanu rernu na 200 stepeni.

PeДҚe se oko 35 minuta.

SaЕӮatka SIГ“DME NIEBO to jedna z moich ulubionych saЕӮatek makaronowych. Zawiera duЕјo warzyw i jogurtu, ktГіry nadaje jej cudownie orzeЕәwiajД…cy smak. Ta saЕӮatka z makaronem jest przygotowywana bardzo szybko i ЕӮatwo i jest doskonaЕӮa jako dodatek do dania gЕӮГіwnego oraz jako danie saЕӮatkowe.

400 g makaronu Mattini
1 gЕӮГіwka fioletowej cebuli (moЕјe byДҮ rГіwnieЕј czarna)
1-2 zД…bki czosnku
1 marchewka
3-4 pikle

1 szklanka jogurtu 180 gr

150-200 g sera feta
2 jajka na twardo
pierwszy

Den sjunde himlen ГӨr en av mina favorit pastasallader. Den bestГҘr av mycket grГ¶nsaker och yoghurt ger den en underbar uppfriskande smak. Denna sallad med pasta gГ¶rs mycket snabbt och enkelt och ГӨr utmГӨrkt som tillbehГ¶r till huvudrГӨtten och som salladsmГҘltid.

es.title: Ensalada con sabor al paraГӯso - ensalada con macarrones
es.description:
La ensalada SEVENTH HEAVEN es una de mis ensaladas de pasta favoritas. Se compone de muchas verduras y el yogur le da un maravilloso sabor refrescante. Esta ensalada con pasta se prepara de manera muy rГЎpida y sencilla y es excelente como guarniciГіn del plato principal y como ensalada.

de.title: Salat mit Paradiesgeschmack
de.description:
Der SEVENTH HEAVEN-Salat ist einer meiner Lieblingsnudelsalate. Es besteht aus viel GemГјse und Joghurt verleiht ihm einen wunderbaren erfrischenden Geschmack. Dieser Salat mit Nudeln wird sehr schnell und einfach zubereitet und eignet sich hervorragend als Beilage zum Hauptgericht und als Salatmahlzeit.

eine Tasse Zuckermais

snippet.title: KuruluЕҹ Osman 46. BГ¶lГјm
snippet.description:
46.BГ¶lГјm:
TARGUN KAГҮMAYI BAЕһARIYOR

PeЕҹinde olduДҹu emanetleri eline geГ§iren ve Bala, Hazal, Lena hatunlarla birlikte DГјndar BeyвҖҷi esir alan Targun; KayДұ ObasДұвҖҷndan kaГ§mayДұ baЕҹarДұr. NikolaвҖҷnДұn tuzaДҹДұna dГјЕҹen ve BamsДұ BeyвҖҷle birlikte Г¶lГјm kalДұm savaЕҹДұ veren Osman Bey, Malhun HatunвҖҷun sГјrpriz desteДҹi ile Bizans saldДұrДұsДұnДұ savuЕҹturur. Flatyos ve askerlerinin tuzaДҹДұna dГјЕҹen SavcДұ Bey ve oДҹlu Bayhoca ise son gГјcГјyle direnmektedir.

MALHUN HATUN PLANLARI ALT ГңST EDД°YOR
TГјrk kaДҹanlarДұndan gelen emanetlerin TargunвҖҷun eline geГ§mesi bГјyГјk Еҹok yaratДұrken; Osman Bey emanetleri geri almak ve Bala Hatun baЕҹta olmak Гјzere tГјm esirleri kurtarmak iГ§in zekice bir plan kurar. Malhun Hatun ve alplerinin desteДҹi ise NikolaвҖҷnДұn planlarДұnДұ deДҹiЕҹtirmesine neden olacaktДұr.

NД°KOLAвҖҷNIN YENД° PLANI NE OLACAK?
Malhun HatunвҖҷun geliЕҹi ve Osman BeyвҖҷe desteДҹi dengeleri nasДұl deДҹiЕҹtirecek? Osman Bey, Bala HatunвҖҷu ve esirleri kurtarmak iГ§in ne yapacak? TГјrk kaДҹanlarДұnДұn emanetlerini ele geГ§iren Targun, elindeki kozu nasДұl kullanacak? PlanlarДұ sekteye uДҹrayan Nikola nasДұl pozisyon alacak? SavcДұ Bey ve BayhocaвҖҷnДұn akДұbeti ne olacak? DГјndar BeyвҖҷin planДұ baЕҹarДұya ulaЕҹacak mДұ? GГ¶ktuДҹ, TargunвҖҷa engel olabilecek mi?

O, kГ¶mГјr karasДұ gГ¶zleriyle, gaza ve hГјrriyet ateЕҹini tutuЕҹturacaktДұ. 

AdДұ, ErtuДҹrul Gazi oДҹlu OsmanвҖҷdДұвҖҰ 

KaranlДұДҹДұn iГ§inde ona yol gГ¶steren вҖңaЕҹkвҖқ olduвҖҰ

Kan ve gГ¶zyaЕҹДұyla sulanan topraklarda, gГ¶k ekini gibi biГ§ilen; yedi gГ¶ДҹГј, yedi yeri, daДҹlarДұ, denizleri aЕҹacak bir milletin rГјyasДұnДұ вҖңaЕҹklaвҖқ gГ¶rdГј.

GГјcГјnГј kДұlДұcДұndan deДҹil, вҖңaЕҹktanвҖқ aldДұвҖҰ ZorbalДұДҹa adaletle; kГ¶leliДҹe hГјrriyetle direnen, tarihin gГ¶rdГјДҹГј en bГјyГјk imparatorluДҹa adДұnДұ вҖңaЕҹklaвҖқ verdi.

72 milleti kДұran bozuk dГјzene karЕҹДұ baЕҹkaldДұrДұ, mazlumlarДұn sessiz Г§ДұДҹlДұДҹДұna umut, KuruluЕҹвҖҷun adДұ olduвҖҰ

KuruluЕҹ OsmanвҖҰ 400 Г§adДұrlДұk bir obadan, вҖңilahi aЕҹklaвҖқ kurulan bir cihan imparatorluДҹuna yГјrГјyГјЕҹГјn hikayesi.

Abone Olmak iГ§in ; https://bit.ly/2t8pQdU

atv Resmi YouTube KanalДұna Abone Olmak Д°Г§in; https://goo.gl/dmrDLN

snippet.description:

Stadion: вҖңGradski stadion u SuboticiвҖқ; 21. februar 2021.

Sudija: Lazar LukiДҮ.

Strelci: Furtula u 36. za Spartak, a IvaniДҮ u 80. i Sanogo u 88. minutu za Crvenu zvezdu.

ЕҪuti kartoni: MarДҚiДҮ, Е imura, DunД‘erski (Spartak), NikoliДҮ, Pavkov (Crvena zvezda).

Spartak: DujmoviДҮ, Е imura, IvanДҚeviДҮ, TekijaЕЎki, SreДҮkoviДҮ(od 69. SreДҮkoviДҮ), MiloЕЎeviДҮ, DunД‘erski, SavkoviДҮ, TufegdЕҫiДҮ, MarДҚiДҮ(od 90. ДҗurasoviДҮ), Furtula(od 69. JovanoviДҮ).

ar.title: ЩғШ§ЩҶ ЩҠШ§ Щ…ЩғШ§ЩҶ ЩҒЩҠ ШӘШҙЩҲЩғЩҲШұЩҲЩҒШ§ Ш§Ш№Щ„Ш§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШӯЩ„ЩӮШ© 85
ar.description: ЩғШ§ЩҶ ЩҠШ§ Щ…ЩғШ§ЩҶ ЩҒЩҠ ШӘШҙЩҲЩғЩҲШұЩҲЩҒШ§ШҢ ЩҠШӘЩҶШ§ЩҲЩ„ ЩҮШ°Ш§ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШіЩ„ШіЩ„ ЩӮШөШ© "ЩҠЩ„Щ…Ш§ШІ" Ш§Щ„Ш°ЩҠ ЩҠШ¬Ш§ШІЩҒ ШЁШ§Щ„ШҜШ®ЩҲЩ„ ШҘЩ„Щү Ш§Щ„ШіШ¬ЩҶ Щ…ЩҶ ШЈШ¬Щ„ Ш§Щ„ШӯШЁ ЩҲЩӮШөШ© "ШІЩ„ЩҠШ®Ш©" Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҠ ЩҠШӯЩғЩ… Ш№Щ„ЩҠЩҮШ§ ШЁШІШ§ЩҲШ¬ ШӘШ№ЩҠШі Щ…Ш№ ШҙШ®Шө Щ„Ш§ ШӘШӯШЁЩҮ Щ…ЩҶ ШЈШ¬Щ„ ШЈЩҶ ЩҠШЁЩӮЩү Ш§Щ„ШұШ¬Щ„ Ш§Щ„Ш°ЩҠ ШӘШӯШЁЩҮ Ш№Щ„Щү ЩӮЩҠШҜ Ш§Щ„ШӯЩҠШ§Ш© Щ…ЩҲШ¶ЩҲШ№Ш§ Щ„ЩҮ. ШҘЩҶ ШӯШЁ ЩҠЩ„Щ…Ш§ШІ ЩҲ ШІЩ„ЩҠШ®Ш© Ш§Щ„Ш°ЩҠ ШЁШҜШЈ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§ШіШ·ЩҶШЁЩҲЩ„ ЩҠЩғШӘШЁ Ш№Щ„ЩҠЩҮ Ш§Щ„Ш§ШіШӘШіЩ„Ш§Щ… Щ„Щ„ЩӮШҜШұ. ШҘЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШҙШ§ШЁЩҠЩҶ Ш§Щ„Ш°ЩҠЩҶ ЩҠЩҶЩҒШөЩ„ Ш·ШұЩҠЩӮЩҮЩ…Ш§ ШЁЩҠЩҶЩ…Ш§ ЩҠЩӮЩҲЩ…ЩҲЩҶ ШЁШӘШӯШ¶ЩҠШұШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШІЩҲШ§Ш¬ШҢ ШіЩҠЩҲШ§Ш¬ЩҮЩҲЩҶ Ш§Щ„Ш§Щ…ШӘШӯШ§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩғШЁШұ ЩҒЩҠ ШЈШ¶ЩҶШ§. ЩҠШӘЩӮШ§Ш·Ш№ Ш·ШұЩҠЩӮ ШІЩ„ЩҠШ®Ш© Щ…Ш№ Щ…Ш№ ШҜЩ…ЩҠШұ ЩҠЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ЩҲШ§Щ„Ш°ЩҠ ЩҮЩҲ Ш§Щ„ЩҲЩ„ШҜ Ш§Щ„ЩҲШӯЩҠШҜ Щ„ШЈШӯШҜ ШЈЩҒШұШ§ШҜ Ш§Щ„Ш№ЩҲШ§ШҰЩ„ Ш§Щ„Ш№ШұЩҠЩӮШ© ЩҲШ§Щ„Ш«ШұЩҠШ© ЩҒЩҠ ШӘШҙЩҲЩғЩҲШұЩҲЩҒШ§. Щ„ЩҠШі ЩҮЩҶШ§Щғ ШҙЩҠШЎ Щ„ЩҶ ЩҠЩҒШ№Щ„ЩҮ ШҜЩ…ЩҠШұ ЩҲШ§Щ„Ш°ЩҠ ЩҠШӯШЁ ШІЩ„ЩҠШ®Ш© ШӯШЁШ§ ШЁЩ„Ш§ ЩҮЩҲШ§ШҜШ© Щ…ЩҶ ШЈШ¬Щ„ЩҮШ§. ШҘЩҶ ЩҠЩ„Щ…Ш§ШІ ЩҲ ШІЩ„ЩҠШ®Ш© ШӯШӘЩү ЩҲЩ„ЩҲ ШЈШұШ§ШҜЩҲШ§ ШЈЩҶ ЩҠШ№ЩҠШҙЩҲШ§ ШӯШЁЩҮЩ… ШЁШ§Щ„ШұШәЩ… Щ…ЩҶ ЩғЩ„ ШҙЩҠШЎ ЩҒЩҒЩҠ ШЁШ№Ш¶ Ш§Щ„ШЈШӯЩҠШ§ЩҶ ШіШӘЩғЩҲЩҶ Ш№Ш§ШҰЩ„Ш© ЩҠЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ЩҲЩҒЩҠ ШЁШ№Ш¶ Ш§Щ„ШЈШӯЩҠШ§ЩҶ ШіЩҠЩғЩҲЩҶ Ш§Щ„ЩӮШҜШұ Ш№Ш§ШҰЩӮШ§ Щ„ЩҮЩ…Ш§. ШҘЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШӯШЁ Ш§Щ„Ш°ЩҠ ЩғШ§ЩҶ ЩӮШҜ ШәЩҠШұ Ш¬ШәШұШ§ЩҒЩҠШ© ШӘШҙЩҲЩғЩҲШұЩҲЩҒШ§ Ш§Щ„ШҙШ§ШіШ№Ш© ЩҒЩҠ Ш№Ш§Щ… 1970 ШҢ ШіЩҠШЁЩӮЩү ШұЩҮЩҠЩҶШ© Ш§Щ„ШӯШіШ§ШЁШ§ШӘ ШәЩҠШұ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШәЩ„ЩӮШ© ЩҲ ШӯШұЩҲШЁ Ш§Щ„ЩӮЩҲШ©.

snippet.title: BMW M5 v Audi RS6 v AMG E63 S - DRAG RACE
snippet.description:
Need help buying your next car? Click https://www.carwow.co.uk/-help-me-carwow and my team and I will help you choose your ideal car at a fair price - from Mat Watson!
.............................................................

HowвҖҷs this for an all-German showdown... Audi RS6 v BMW M5 Competition v Mercedes-AMG E63 S! 

All three of these contenders can produce a serious amount of power. First up weвҖҷve got Mat in his RS6, which is powered by a 4-litre twin-turbo V8 and can put down 600hp & 800Nm of torque. Alongside him we have the new BMW M5 Competition, with a 4.4-litre twin-turbo V8 delivering 625hp and 750Nm. 

And then finally we have the AMG E63 S, which is housing a 4-litre twin-turbo V8 which produces 612hp and 850Nm. 

So how do you think this will play out? The M5 puts down the most power, so will it snatch the win? Or will the AudiвҖҷs Quattro AWD prove a decisive on this wet track? ThereвҖҷs only one way to find outвҖҰ LETвҖҷS RACE!

Check out Mat's saving on one of these cars - http://bit.ly/Mats-Choice-2002

snippet.title: KuruluЕҹ Osman 47. BГ¶lГјm
snippet.description:
47.BГ¶lГјm:
OSMAN BEY BГңYГңK SAVAЕһA HAZIRLANIYOR
ГҮГ¶mlekГ§i Д°drisвҖҷin obadaki hainlerin ismini veremeden infaz edilmesinin ardДұndan hainleri ortaya Г§Дұkarmak iГ§in harekete geГ§en Osman Bey, NikolaвҖҷnДұn KonstantinopolisвҖҷe Г§aДҹДұrДұldДұДҹДұ bilgisi alДұr. NikolaвҖҷyДұ ele geГ§irmek iГ§in bir baskДұn planlayan ve savaЕҹ hazДұrlДұklarДұna baЕҹlayan Osman Bey, bu kez avДұnДұ elinden kaГ§Дұrmamaya kararlДұdДұr. PapaвҖҷnДұn ajanlarДұ Melik ve SГјleyman bu istihbaratДұn Osman BeyвҖҷe ulaЕҹtДұДҹДұnДұn bilgisini verince, Nikola, Osman BeyвҖҷi ters kГ¶Еҹeye yatДұrmak iГ§in plan kurar.  

MALHUN HATUN VE BALA HATUN ARASINDA SOДһUK RГңZGARLAR
TargunвҖҷun Г¶lГјmГјnГјn ardДұndan KumanlarДұn lideri haline gelen GГ¶ktuДҹ, kutsal emanetleri NikolaвҖҷya gГ¶tГјrerek onun gГјvenini kazanmaya Г§alДұЕҹДұr. ГҮГ¶mlekГ§i Д°drisвҖҷin Г¶lГјmГјnГјn ardДұndan gГјvende olduДҹunu dГјЕҹГјnen DГјndar Bey yeni bir ittifak arayДұЕҹДұna girer. Alpleriyle birlikte uГ§ bГ¶lgesine gelen ve obasДұ iГ§in yeni bir yurt bulmak iГ§in Г§alДұЕҹan Malhun HatunвҖҷa Osman BeyвҖҷin ilgisi Bala HatunвҖҷu rahatsДұz eder. Malhun HatunвҖҷun bey kДұzДұ tavrДұ Bala HatunвҖҷla arasДұnda soДҹuk rГјzgarlar esmesine neden olur. 

NД°KOLAвҖҷNIN TAKTД°ДһД° Д°ЕһE YARAYACAK MI?
Osman Bey, NikolaвҖҷyДұ alt edebilmek iГ§in nasДұl bir taktik kuracak? Nikola, Osman BeyвҖҷi tuzaДҹa dГјЕҹГјrebilecek mi? Bizans kuvvetleri ve KayДұ alpleri arasДұndaki mГјthiЕҹ savaЕҹДұn galibi kim olacak? GГ¶ktuДҹ, NikolaвҖҷnДұn gГјvenini kazanabilecek mi? DГјndar Bey, yeni ittifakДұnda aradДұДҹДұnДұ bulabilecek mi? Malhun Hatun planlarДұnДұ gerГ§ekleЕҹtirebilecek mi? Malhun Hatun ve Bala Hatun arasДұnda neler yaЕҹanacak?
 
O, kГ¶mГјr karasДұ gГ¶zleriyle, gaza ve hГјrriyet ateЕҹini tutuЕҹturacaktДұ. 

AdДұ, ErtuДҹrul Gazi oДҹlu OsmanвҖҷdДұвҖҰ 

KaranlДұДҹДұn iГ§inde ona yol gГ¶steren вҖңaЕҹkвҖқ olduвҖҰ

Kan ve gГ¶zyaЕҹДұyla sulanan topraklarda, gГ¶k ekini gibi biГ§ilen; yedi gГ¶ДҹГј, yedi yeri, daДҹlarДұ, denizleri aЕҹacak bir milletin rГјyasДұnДұ вҖңaЕҹklaвҖқ gГ¶rdГј.

GГјcГјnГј kДұlДұcДұndan deДҹil, вҖңaЕҹktanвҖқ aldДұвҖҰ ZorbalДұДҹa adaletle; kГ¶leliДҹe hГјrriyetle direnen, tarihin gГ¶rdГјДҹГј en bГјyГјk imparatorluДҹa adДұnДұ вҖңaЕҹklaвҖқ verdi.

72 milleti kДұran bozuk dГјzene karЕҹДұ baЕҹkaldДұrДұ, mazlumlarДұn sessiz Г§ДұДҹlДұДҹДұna umut, KuruluЕҹвҖҷun adДұ olduвҖҰ

KuruluЕҹ OsmanвҖҰ 400 Г§adДұrlДұk bir obadan, вҖңilahi aЕҹklaвҖқ kurulan bir cihan imparatorluДҹuna yГјrГјyГјЕҹГјn hikayesi.

Abone Olmak iГ§in ; https://bit.ly/2t8pQdU

atv Resmi YouTube KanalДұna Abone Olmak Д°Г§in; https://goo.gl/dmrDLN

KuruluЕҹ OsmanвҖҰ 400 Г§adДұrlДұk bir obadan, вҖңilahi aЕҹklaвҖқ kurulan bir cihan imparatorluДҹuna yГјrГјyГјЕҹГјn hikayesi.

tr.title: KuruluЕҹ Osman 47. BГ¶lГјm
tr.description:
47.BГ¶lГјm:
OSMAN BEY BГңYГңK SAVAЕһA HAZIRLANIYOR
ГҮГ¶mlekГ§i Д°drisвҖҷin obadaki hainlerin ismini veremeden infaz edilmesinin ardДұndan hainleri ortaya Г§Дұkarmak iГ§in harekete geГ§en Osman Bey, NikolaвҖҷnДұn KonstantinopolisвҖҷe Г§aДҹДұrДұldДұДҹДұ bilgisi alДұr. NikolaвҖҷyДұ ele geГ§irmek iГ§in bir baskДұn planlayan ve savaЕҹ hazДұrlДұklarДұna baЕҹlayan Osman Bey, bu kez avДұnДұ elinden kaГ§Дұrmamaya kararlДұdДұr. PapaвҖҷnДұn ajanlarДұ Melik ve SГјleyman bu istihbaratДұn Osman BeyвҖҷe ulaЕҹtДұДҹДұnДұn bilgisini verince, Nikola, Osman BeyвҖҷi ters kГ¶Еҹeye yatДұrmak iГ§in plan kurar.  

MALHUN HATUN VE BALA HATUN ARASINDA SOДһUK RГңZGARLAR
TargunвҖҷun Г¶lГјmГјnГјn ardДұndan KumanlarДұn lideri haline gelen GГ¶ktuДҹ, kutsal emanetleri NikolaвҖҷya gГ¶tГјrerek onun gГјvenini kazanmaya Г§alДұЕҹДұr. ГҮГ¶mlekГ§i Д°drisвҖҷin Г¶lГјmГјnГјn ardДұndan gГјvende olduДҹunu dГјЕҹГјnen DГјndar Bey yeni bir ittifak arayДұЕҹДұna girer. Alpleriyle birlikte uГ§ bГ¶lgesine gelen ve obasДұ iГ§in yeni bir yurt bulmak iГ§in Г§alДұЕҹan Malhun HatunвҖҷa Osman BeyвҖҷin ilgisi Bala HatunвҖҷu rahatsДұz eder. Malhun HatunвҖҷun bey kДұzДұ tavrДұ Bala HatunвҖҷla arasДұnda soДҹuk rГјzgarlar esmesine neden olur. 

NД°KOLAвҖҷNIN TAKTД°ДһД° Д°ЕһE YARAYACAK MI?
Osman Bey, NikolaвҖҷyДұ alt edebilmek iГ§in nasДұl bir taktik kuracak? Nikola, Osman BeyвҖҷi tuzaДҹa dГјЕҹГјrebilecek mi? Bizans kuvvetleri ve KayДұ alpleri arasДұndaki mГјthiЕҹ savaЕҹДұn galibi kim olacak? GГ¶ktuДҹ, NikolaвҖҷnДұn gГјvenini kazanabilecek mi? DГјndar Bey, yeni ittifakДұnda aradДұДҹДұnДұ bulabilecek mi? Malhun Hatun planlarДұnДұ gerГ§ekleЕҹtirebilecek mi? Malhun Hatun ve Bala Hatun arasДұnda neler yaЕҹanacak?
 
O, kГ¶mГјr karasДұ gГ¶zleriyle, gaza ve hГјrriyet ateЕҹini tutuЕҹturacaktДұ. 

AdДұ, ErtuДҹrul Gazi oДҹlu OsmanвҖҷdДұвҖҰ 

KaranlДұДҹДұn iГ§inde ona yol gГ¶steren вҖңaЕҹkвҖқ olduвҖҰ

Kan ve gГ¶zyaЕҹДұyla sulanan topraklarda, gГ¶k ekini gibi biГ§ilen; yedi gГ¶ДҹГј, yedi yeri, daДҹlarДұ, denizleri aЕҹacak bir milletin rГјyasДұnДұ вҖңaЕҹklaвҖқ gГ¶rdГј.

GГјcГјnГј kДұlДұcДұndan deДҹil, вҖңaЕҹktanвҖқ aldДұвҖҰ ZorbalДұДҹa adaletle; kГ¶leliДҹe hГјrriyetle direnen, tarihin gГ¶rdГјДҹГј en bГјyГјk imparatorluДҹa adДұnДұ вҖңaЕҹklaвҖқ verdi.

72 milleti kДұran bozuk dГјzene karЕҹДұ baЕҹkaldДұrДұ, mazlumlarДұn sessiz Г§ДұДҹlДұДҹДұna umut, KuruluЕҹвҖҷun adДұ olduвҖҰ

snippet.title: MIC-MC-GOD MODE (OFFICIAL AUDIO)
snippet.description:
MIC-MC : https://www.instagram.com/micmc_93/

TEKST:

Koliko svez brate
vi morate da vezbate
jer repovati ne znate
sve znate,face su vam bez brate
sta je to u trendingu mora da me zezate
predahnem 

Ne mogu vise da gledam ova sranja,dranja,pomilovanja
imam nocne more sanjam

celija mozdana mi manja kazu mi da sam bog
bolje bi bilo bogu da se klanjas 

ne mogu stati ja dok ne dodje do klanja
jebeno lud evo mentalnog mi stanja 
eto me svud samo ganjam
vidi mi trud vidi kralja 
hejtere udarim preko glave poput thorovoga malja 

brate udarim kako valja,neko mi tamo obraz kalja 
habada babada babada babada govore glupi ljudi puni znanja
koliko repera trebam da pokidam da bi razumeli da sam budala
voli me svaki blok kraj stek voli me svaka mahala 
reperi za mene su sala meni je mikrofon taj alat
bolje mi bezi bre pedala,hteo bi feat neka hvala  
ne mogu tik tok repere,hip hop trepere para
ne mogu da mi plate pa se zapale izgore ko cigara
stivena sigala glume ala nemaju signala 
ponela ih slava dali za to deo svog anala
u Srbiji sam tata,kralj bog,eminem pa alah 
tako govore ljudi za mene pa mi previsoka skala 
ovo je odvod,prati moj hod UFO moj brod
ljudi su govna neki su manji govnima su pod rod
ja sam pro pro nisam propo moj kod 
10 dina ovde sada uso sam u GOD MOde


Malo mi treba da napadnem likove
moji mi govore ne veruj nikome 
pojedem barove snerove bitove 
ne moze niko da ponovi i to me 
zele kopirati praviti hitove
da li je moguce neko da skine me 
picke mekane face im vilene
oni bi hteli dole da vide me 

ne mogu dole da budem ja gorim 
i gorivo tera me jako da lomi
i repere volim kad leze u komi
a lirika zube im polomi boli 
ti bogovi pitaju kako postojim
i rogovi rastu mi sebe se bojim
jebe se meni da pobede brojim
propali ovi tu reperi tvoji

Za 10 godina nisam postigo ono sto ti si 

zabole me ono sto mi visi 

razlika izmedju mene i tebe 
kad ja repovo sam ti si tati u testisu bio samo orhitis-guglaj

U prevodu bio si bol u mudima
svako se pita na sta tacno ja aludiram 
ovo skola je za sve a oni mi uzina 
radis playback to ti je kao sebi da aplaudiras 
boii

Vidim dredove te furas glumac
nisi lil pump mozda mala pumpica za kurac
dm rejpujes mi nisam do sad video te buraz 
ni spomenuo pa ne znam zasto se tu guras

hoces clout vidim da si nula 
jebo mir hocu rat evo kozna frula
posto vidim bas si zapeo da duvas 
takve jebem vec odavno nemoj tu da mi se kurvas
